prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京师范大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约3653名→3780名→4260名→4499名→4649名，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约1000名，近3年累计后移约389名；2025年基准位次约4649名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021年5人、2022年6人、2023年7人、2024年8人、2025年8人；2026年计划扩至10人，较2025年增加2人（+25%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京师范大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第19名，近年排名稳定在Top20区间，属于国内顶尖师范类学府；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第37位（较热），短视频平台关注度中等偏上；历史无投档断档或异常记录，报考心理较为平稳；第五轮学科评估中，北京师范大学拥有A+学科6个（教育学、心理学、中国语言文学、中国史、地理学、马克思主义理论），A学科4个，A-学科8个，A-及以上共计18个，学科实力极为突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在沪招生专业涉及经济学/金融学（社会热度分化观望）、英语（外语类一般观望）、统计学（数学/统计类推荐）、地理科学类、物理学类等；上海2026年普通高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争加剧；北京师范大学位于北京市，非上海本地高校；该校在全国招生总量中上海市占比极小（2021–2025年招生人数5–8人），属于跨省招生，上海考生需考虑地域偏好因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（5年后移约1000名）、2026年计划扩招25%（推高位次数字增大）、上海考生总数大幅增长约35.4%（竞争加剧）、学校层次极高且声誉稳定（有一定吸引力），扩招与考生增加对位次的下行压力基本抵消学校层次的吸引力；预测2026年最低录取位次约5346名，波动区间4846–5846名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 经济学（励耘实验班）
- 统计学（经济学、统计学双学士学位项目）（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 金融学
- 物理学类（含物理学、天文学）（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 英语
- 地理科学类（含自然地理与资源环境、人文地理与城乡规划、地理信息科学、资源环境科学）（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5346名，区间4846–5846名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<4846名）可重点冲刺一档的经济学（励耘实验班）或新增的统计学双学士学位项目；位次接近区间上限（>5846名）建议以三档的地理科学类或英语为主。2026年新增的统计学双学士学位项目和地理科学类值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing Normal University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 3653 → 3780 → 4260 → 4499 → 4649, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1000 places over the past 5 years and about 389 places over the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4649; the enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai's comprehensive category was 5 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 8 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is to expand to 10, an increase of 2 (+25%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 19th in the 2026 main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings, and has been stable in the Top 20 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier normal universities in China; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high attention on short video platforms; there is no history of enrollment gaps or anomalies, and the application psychology is relatively stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Beijing Normal University has 6 A+ disciplines (Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, Marxist Theory), 4 A disciplines, and 8 A- disciplines, with a total of 18 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating extremely outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors recruited in Shanghai include Economics/Finance (social heat divided/wait-and-see), English (foreign languages generally wait-and-see), Statistics (mathematics/statistics recommended), Geographical Sciences, Physics, etc.; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Shanghai; the proportion of Shanghai in the university's national enrollment is very small (5–8 students from 2021 to 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and Shanghai candidates need to consider regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (backward shift of about 1000 places over 5 years), the planned enrollment expansion of 25% in 2026 (pushing the ranking number higher), the significant increase of about 35.4% in the total number of Shanghai candidates (intensified competition), and the very high university level with stable reputation (some attractiveness), the downward pressure on rankings from expansion and candidate increase basically offsets the attractiveness of the university level; the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 5346, with a fluctuation range of 4846–5846.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Economics (Liyun Experimental Class)
- Statistics (Economics and Statistics Dual Bachelor's Degree Program) (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Finance
- Physics (including Physics, Astronomy) (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- English
- Geographical Sciences (including Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, Geographic Information Science, Resource and Environmental Science) (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 5346, range 4846–5846. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4846), focus on sprinting for Tier 1's Economics (Liyun Experimental Class) or the new Statistics Dual Bachelor's Degree Program; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>5846), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3's Geographical Sciences or English. The new Statistics Dual Bachelor's Degree Program and Geographical Sciences added in 2026 are worth special attention.
